name: uc41-html-formatted-chapters
description: HTML-formatted chapters of *Unprofessional Conduct in the 41st*, my Disco Elysium fanfic on AO3. Marked up for the `ao3-adaptive-disco-elysium-workskin` skill check styling — readable across light mode, Ao3Reversi theme, desktop, and mobile.

scripts.build: rm -rf build && mkdir -p build/css build/js build/vendor build/chapters && cp index.html build/ && cp ao3-preview/src/html/*.html build/ && cp ao3-preview/src/css/*.css build/css/ && cp ao3-preview/src/vendor/*.css build/vendor/ && cp chapters/*.html build/chapters/ && tsc --project ao3-preview/tsconfig.json
